title: Shipping Policy
body:
We currently ship domestically within the United States. Orders over $100 ship free via standard ground service. Orders are processed within 2–5 business days, excluding weekends and holidays. Once your order ships you will receive a confirmation email with tracking information. International shipping is not available on this preview site. All shipping times are estimates and may vary by destination and carrier demand.

This preview site reflects our intended shipping policy. The final, legally binding version will appear when live commerce is enabled.
